explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Published materials discuss a partnership focused on strengthening capabilities and future innovations. This partnership is related to AI platform development and its use.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for **governance** and **transparency**. It supports governance by discussing a partnership aimed at strengthening capabilities and future innovations, implying oversight in AI platform development and use. Transparency is supported by mentioning the use of Google Cloud's Vertex AI platform for enhancing their clinical inventory management system.
relevant_sources.title: Owens & Minor Announces New Partnership with Google Cloud

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Published materials reference the use of Google Cloud's Vertex AI platform. This platform is specified for enhancing the company's clinical inventory management system.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for **governance** and **transparency**. It supports governance by discussing a partnership aimed at strengthening capabilities and future innovations, implying oversight in AI platform development and use. Transparency is supported by mentioning the use of Google Cloud's Vertex AI platform for enhancing their clinical inventory management system.
relevant_sources.title: Owens & Minor Announces New Partnership with Google Cloud

summary.overall_findings: Owens & Minor's published materials mention the use of Google Cloud's Vertex AI platform for enhancing their clinical inventory management system, documenting practices related to transparency. These disclosures address 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars, with governance also documented through discussions of a partnership aimed at strengthening capabilities and future innovations related to AI platform development and use. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars, based on a review of 5 publicly available sources.
